host: pool:ubu-1 (Linux x86_64) — heavy ML moved off macOS per disk-pressure lesson
hypothesis_tested: ALIGNN jv_supercon_tc_alignn (claimed pressure-aware per D2 survey) predicts high-P hydride Tc better than BETE-NET's 91-97% miss
verdict: FALSIFIED for the generic model — jv_supercon_tc_alignn is the AMBIENT JARVIS-DFT supercon model (Choudhary-Garrity ~1058 conventional materials), NOT the arxiv:2312.12694 high-P hydride model. It is even worse on hydrides (caps all at 1.5-2.6 K).
structures_source: D1 publication-grade CIFs (Drozdov 2015 H3S · Somayazulu 2019 LaH10 · Troyan 2021 YH6 · Ma 2022 CaH6) — same inputs BETE-NET used in D1
model_zoo_note: alignn.pretrained has exactly 4 supercon models, all ambient: jv_supercon_{tc,edos,debye,a2F}_alignn. No hydride/pressure-specific model in pip distribution.
findings: CROSS-MODEL CONFIRMATION: two independent architectures (BETE-NET bootstrapped graph-NN ensemble + ALIGNN line-graph NN) BOTH collapse on high-P hydrides (>=98.9% under-prediction). This hardens the limit — ambient-trained ML cannot extrapolate to high-P electron-phonon coupling. Honest confirmation, not the breakthrough.
ALIGNN is better-behaved than BETE-NET on some OOD: FeSe 47.5% vs 97% · BaPbO3 72% vs 2978% (no extreme blowup). Deterministic, no ensemble sigma.
A15 family cross-validates between models: Nb3Sn 49.6% vs 50.0% · V3Si 69.7% vs 71.3% — a 2-model consensus funnel for the BETE-NET-trusted family is now possible.
Speed: ALIGNN 0.17s vs BETE-NET 100-ensemble 25-35s (~150x faster) — enables broad fast screening with BETE-NET reserved for uncertainty quantification.
breakthrough_path_refined: (1) Obtain the SPECIFIC arxiv:2312.12694 hydride model (figshare/supplementary deposit, 900+ hydrides 0-500 GPa) — NOT jv_supercon_tc_alignn.

(2) Direct first-principles EPW on pool (ubu-1/ubu-2): QE + Wannier90 + EPW — pressure-aware by construction, no ML training-distribution dependence (MP.md Phase 3). Physics-grounded breakthrough path.
(3) jv_supercon_a2F_alignn -> Allen-Dynes (sim.hexa) as an alternative Tc route — still ambient-trained, likely same ceiling; test cheaply.
r4_invariant: absorbed=false · gate_type=simulation-only-prediction · domain=material (not rtsc). Pattern 1 avoided (no RTSC absorbed=true claim). Pattern 2 avoided (null result REFINES breakthrough path; goal not abandoned, candidate matrix append-only).
citations: arxiv:2312.12694 — Data-driven Design of High Pressure Hydride Superconductors using DFT and Deep Learning (the ACTUAL pressure-aware model; separate from jv_supercon_tc_alignn)
Choudhary & Garrity 2022 — JARVIS-DFT supercon Tc (jv_supercon_tc_alignn training set, ambient)
arxiv:2401.16611 — BETE-NET (Gibson et al., npj Comput. Mater. 11:11, 2025)
